fixed.fix: Changed default prop to '> GET_STARTED' in checkout-button.tsx

acceptedPatterns.note: Context-dependent: '> SIGN_IN' for buttons, 'Sign In' for i18n, 'sign in' for prose

Navigation items may use plain 'Dashboard' vs '> DASHBOARD' depending on context
